scenarios.description: parseInput(Reader,String) propagates IllegalStateException from custom TreeBuilder.parse
scenarios.precondition: Parser with stub TreeBuilder that throws in parse(Reader,*,*)
pseudocode: // Arrange: stub TreeBuilder that always throws
@Override public Document parse(Reader in, String uri, Parser p) { throw new IllegalStateException("fail"); }
@Override public List<Node> parseFragment(Reader r, Element c, String u, Parser p) { return null; }
@Override public boolean isContentForTagData(String n) { return false; }
@Override public void initialiseParse(Reader in, String baseUri, Parser p) {}
